summary: Seocho is Seoul's second PPP stronghold, driven by class/apartment politics plus the legal-profession cluster (법조 타운) around the Supreme Court/Seocho-dong. 조은희 won 68.44% in 갑 — the largest single-district margin in Seoul in 2024.

issues.label: Wealth / class composition
issues.description: Seocho rivals Gangnam in per-capita income; legal-profession cluster adds professional conservatism.

issues.label: Real-estate politics
issues.description: Banpo/Seocho apartment belts align with Gangnam-style real-estate conservatism.
